reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio, el mozo Ramiro un fenómeno, muy atento y las medialunas riquísimas

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the waiter Ramiro was fantastic, very attentive, and the croissants were delicious.

Excellent service, very professional staff.

reviews.comment:
Visitamos esta estación de servicio la semana pasada y almorzamos en el restaurante que se encuentra anexo a la misma. La atención es muy buena y la calidad de los platos realmente es para destacar.

(Translated by Google)
We visited this gas station last week and had lunch at the restaurant attached to it. The service was excellent and the quality of the food was truly outstanding.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNleWRqeXJnRRAB
